steps.action: Bomba is an umbrella term that refers to a varie with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, hold hands, partner opposite, accent beat, grounded.
steps.text: Bomba is an umbrella term that refers to a varie with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, hold hands, partner opposite, accent beat, grounded.

steps.action: Cane workers used music and dance to release fee
steps.text: Cane workers used music and dance to release feelings of sadness, anger, and resistance; they were also used to communicate and plan rebellions and were integrated into baptism and marriage celebrations.

steps.action: For example, the style performed in Ponce is dis
steps.text: For example, the style performed in Ponce is distinguished by the use of large drums which are mounted vertically.

steps.action: The music of Haitian slaves, many of whom were b
steps.text: The music of Haitian slaves, many of whom were brought to Puerto Rico during the Haitian Revolution, contributed to the yubá rhythm typical to bomba in Mayagüez.

steps.action: Within Puerto Rico, however, bomba was insulated
steps.text: Within Puerto Rico, however, bomba was insulated from these developments and thus retained its traditional character.

steps.action: The lead dancer performs a series of spontaneous
steps.text: The lead dancer performs a series of spontaneous movements which the primo interprets to deliver a rhythmic accompaniment, while one or more buleador (low drum) players maintain the basic rhythm.

steps.action: Therefore, it is the drummer who follows the lea
steps.text: Therefore, it is the drummer who follows the lead set by the dancer, as opposed to the more common practice of the dancer following the drummer.

steps.action: When there are no dancers, the primo improvises.
steps.text: When there are no dancers, the primo improvises.

steps.action: For example, the song "Palo e bandera" tells the
steps.text: For example, the song "Palo e bandera" tells the story of a love triangle between a female singer; her husband, the primo; and a female dancer.

steps.action: The wife realizes her husband is cheating on her
steps.text: The wife realizes her husband is cheating on her with the dancer and proceeds to exact revenge on the dance floor.

steps.action: To reinforce regional distinctions, bomba is div
steps.text: To reinforce regional distinctions, bomba is divided into two main rhythms: sones (south) and seises (north).

steps.action: Bomba dancers and musicians typically appropriat
steps.text: Bomba dancers and musicians typically appropriate small spaces in popular areas to “make culture” (“hacer cultura”).

steps.action: The dancer enters the Batey to stroll around, sh
steps.text: The dancer enters the Batey to stroll around, showing off, marking their territory.

steps.action: The dancer greets the Primo Barrel and starts do
steps.text: The dancer greets the Primo Barrel and starts doing “Piquetes” (improvised bomba steps).

steps.action: When the dancer finishes providing the “Piquetes
steps.text: When the dancer finishes providing the “Piquetes”, they bow again to the Primo Barrel and the next dancer repeats the process.

steps.action: " Depending on the rhythm, the dancer then has t
steps.text: " Depending on the rhythm, the dancer then has to raise the intensity of the music by increasingly complicating their steps to gradually escalate the challenge directed to the lead drummer.

steps.action: Experienced dancers finish the challenge at the
steps.text: Experienced dancers finish the challenge at the highest peak of intensity they can achieve before getting tired or losing rhythm.

steps.action: During the dance, sometimes the audience shouts
steps.text: During the dance, sometimes the audience shouts "Speak!

steps.action: " This is because the dancer is having a musical
steps.text: " This is because the dancer is having a musical conversation with the bomba drum (Primo) through their “Piquetes” (bomba steps).

steps.action: In this conversation, any dance must be markable
steps.text: In this conversation, any dance must be markable by the Primo, and anything the Primo plays must be danceable.

steps.action: The bomba traditional dress for men is white hat
steps.text: The bomba traditional dress for men is white hat, white shirt and black or white pants.

steps.action: Petticoats are handmade to show them off in a fl
steps.text: Petticoats are handmade to show them off in a flirtatious way for men and to create envy among other female dancers.

steps.action: The way skirts are used and held in bomba dancin
steps.text: The way skirts are used and held in bomba dancing is unique.

steps.action: The traditional barriles de bombas are built fro
steps.text: The traditional barriles de bombas are built from rum barrels and goatskin.
